title: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Dynamic Pricing

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Dynamic Pricing

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='30' y='30' width='340' height='240' rx='10' fill='#411C56'/><g transform='translate(50, 50)'><text x='0' y='20' font-size='24' font-family='Arial' fill='#FFFFFF'>Product Recommendation Engine</text><text x='0' y='40' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#FFFFFF'>Fetch top 5 products based on user preferences</text></g><g transform='translate(120, 150)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='20' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='0' y='15' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#FFFFFF'>Search</text></g><g transform='translate(120, 180)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='20' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='0' y='15' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#FFFFFF'>Filter</text></g><g transform='translate(120, 210)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='20' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='0' y='15' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#FFFFFF'>Recommendations</text></g><g transform='translate(120, 240)'><rect x='0' y='0' width='200' height='20' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='0' y='15' font-size='18' font-family='Arial' fill='#FFFFFF'>Dynamic Pricing</text></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must include a search bar with real-time suggestions
Must display top 5 recommended products based on user preferences
Must use dynamic pricing table with real-time price updates
Must be fully interactive with state updates

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Recommendation Engine with Dynamic Pricing

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, product filtering, search suggestions, and dynamic pricing updates.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
